title: Ventaver's Custom Shinies (Cobblemon)
description: Retextures unpopular and/or underwhelming shiny Pokémon. For Cobblemon.
body:
![Ventaver's Custom Shinies Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5406a3f4bce89d0fd3ad0f74dd0510ec1f97a529.png)

A Pack for Cobblemon that recolours unpopular and/or underwhelming shiny forms of various Pokémon without going too overboard with the changes.

##
**Pokémon currently included:**
- Pikachu & Pichu
- Persian
- _Gengar*_
- Tauros
- Jolteon, Leafeon & Glaceon
- Magcargo
- Stantler & Wyrdeer
- Blissey & Happiny
- Garchomp
- Basculin (Red & Blue-Striped)
- Beheeyem
- Bouffalant
- Centiskorch & Sizzlipede
- Maushold & Tandemaus
- Squawkabilly (Green, Blue, Yellow & Gray)
- Charcadet, Armarouge & Ceruledge
- Tinkaton, Tinkatuff & Tinkatink
- Annihilape

**Pokémon Planned-To-Be:**
- Slowpoke
- Shedinja
- Plusle
- Sawsbuck & Deerling
- Quaxly, Quaxwell & Quaquaval

##
Known Issues
- Technically not an issue but the changes to Gengar cannot be easily seen in-game. This is because only Gengar's tongue is edited and, due to the Pokémon having no animations yet, it never opens its mouth.

- A pokémon with an alternate form that uses the same texture _might_ not have the custom one applied. (e.g. Gender Differences or Family Of Four Maushold) I think this is an incompatability issue but I don't know the cause yet as this has only happened once.

- Too much brown.
